title: Text widget that works with mirrored columns like the information cards
excerpt: “In my first board, I have a column of type ‘text’. In one item, I fill in this column. In my second board, which is a mirrored board, the text is correctly reflected through the mirrored column. But when I go to the ‘it…

posts.author: c.moulin (Clément)
posts.cookedHtml: “In my first board, I have a column of type ‘text’. In one item, I fill in this column. In my second board, which is a mirrored board, the text is correctly reflected through the mirrored column. But when I go to the ‘item page’, where there is an ‘information’ widget with a text field, it works. However, it doesn’t work if I add a ‘text’ widget linked to the same mirrored column. Even though the widget suggests this mirrored text column and links to it, the widget does not work.”
